name: chainiq
description: ChainIQ — AI Content Intelligence Platform. Generates full standalone HTML article pages from minimal input by adapting to any website's design system. Features: first-time setup gate, built-in structural component registry (170+ blueprints), runtime visual adaptation, domain integrity enforcement, multi-round research via Gemini MCP, portable Gemini image generation, 4-6 images per article, graceful fallback, sidebar table of contents, visual trust layer, section editing via bridge server, topic-aware composition, and three adaptation modes. Works on any project.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate an article from a keyword. Asks for the topic and optional language, then runs the full article engine pipeline.

commands.name: start-bridge
commands.description: Start the Article Engine bridge server for section editing from the browser.

commands.name: stop-bridge
commands.description: Stop the Article Engine bridge server.

commands.name: apply-edit
commands.description: Apply a section edit from clipboard when the bridge server is not running.
